name: PlayFab
description: PlayFab — Microsoft's managed game backend platform for authentication, leaderboards, inventory, and multiplayer sessions.

seo.title: PlayFab — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: PlayFab: PlayFab — Microsoft's managed game backend platform for authentication, leaderboards, inventory, and multiplayer sessions.

when_to_use: Microsoft's managed game backend for authentication and economy
Inventory and virtual currency management for game studios
Leaderboards and tournament systems via PlayFab API
Cross-platform player data and achievements in one dashboard
Azure-backed BaaS for mobile, console, and PC game titles

pros: Good free tier for small studios
cons: Steep learning curve for full surface
review.verdict: Still the default choice for serious game backends, just budget time to learn the sprawl.
review.best_for: Game studios wanting a mature, full-featured managed backend with Microsoft backing
review.not_for: Teams wanting minimal BaaS or those allergic to Microsoft-style product surfaces

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
